title: malapoenna nitens
side_effects: Malapoenna nitens can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and stomach ulcers due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to respiratory failure, kidney damage, and even death. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and eye inflammation. Improper handling of the plant can also result in skin absorption of its toxic compounds, leading to long-term health issues.
